Item.description: Information about an item in the cart.

SalesNotes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

DiscountAmount.description: The amount the item is discounted. This parameter is ignored for packages.

AppointmentBookingRequests.description: A list of appointments to be booked then paid for by this item. This parameter applies only to pricing option items.

EnrollmentIds.description: A list of enrollment IDs that this item is to pay for. This parameter applies only to pricing option items.

ClassIds.description: A list of class IDs that this item is to pay for. This parameter applies only to pricing option items.

CourseIds.description: A list of course IDs that this item is to pay for. This parameter applies only to pricing option items.

VisitIds.description: A list of visit IDs that this item is to pay for. This parameter applies only to pricing option items.

AppointmentIds.description: A list of appointment IDs that this item is to reconcile.

Id.description: The item’s unique ID within the cart.

Quantity.description: The number of this item to be purchased.
